title: helichrysum araxinum
intro: Helichrysum araxinum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and silvery-gray foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum araxinum contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum araxinum are commonly used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
